linear_acceleration: ((variable.particle_random_4<v.limit)?( v.length * 22 * math.cos(variable.particle_age / variable.particle_lifetime * 90 ) ):( v.length * 20 * math.cos(variable.particle_age / variable.particle_lifetime * 140 ) )) * -(variable.particle_random_1 * 0.2 + 0.8)

size: ((variable.particle_random_4<v.limit)?( v.size1 * (0.6 + 0.4 * (1 - math.cos(variable.particle_age / variable.particle_lifetime * 90))) * (2 - math.cos(variable.particle_age / variable.particle_lifetime * 110 - 20)) ):( v.size2 * math.sin(variable.particle_age / variable.particle_lifetime * 180) )) * ((math.mod(variable.particle_random_4*100,1)<0.5)?-1:1) * (math.mod(variable.particle_random_3*100,1) * 0.5 + 0.5)

((variable.particle_random_4<v.limit)?( v.size1 * (0.6 + 0.4 * (1 - math.cos(variable.particle_age / variable.particle_lifetime * 90))) * (2 - math.cos(variable.particle_age / variable.particle_lifetime * 110 - 20)) ):( v.size2 * math.sin(variable.particle_age / variable.particle_lifetime * 180) )) * (math.mod(variable.particle_random_3*100,1) * 0.5 + 0.5)
